messages.content: ok kind of a funny coincidence, i keep seeing this one little cafe pop up everywhere this week

That kind of thing has a way of catching attention — something you might have walked past a hundred times suddenly feels like it's following you.

What's pulling at you about it?
like a friend mentioned it, then i walked past it, then it was in a show i was watching. three times

Three times in a week does have a certain weight to it — enough to make you wonder if you're being nudged toward something.

Is there a part of you that wants to go?
feels like the universe is nudging me to finally go check it out lol. i'm a little superstitious like that

There's something kind of nice about that — letting small coincidences give you permission to do something you were maybe already curious about.

What's held you back from just going?
i know it's just my brain noticing the same thing more, but it's a fun excuse to try a new spot
That's a pretty good deal — your brain does the pattern-matching, and you get a reason to try something new.
gonna go this weekend and get whatever their signature drink is. small adventures, you know
Small adventures are underrated. There's something good about following a low-stakes nudge just to see where it goes.
